steps.title: Identify the formula
steps.content: The area of a circle is given by $A = \pi r^2$, where $r$ is the radius. We're given $r = 35$ mm.

steps.title: Substitute and calculate
steps.content:
Substituting $r = 35$ into the formula:
$$A = \pi(35)^2$$
Since $35^2 = 1225$:
$$A = 1225\pi \text{ mm}^2$$
That matches choice D — D is correct.
